params.name: Opera Phantom
params.description:
On Nov 5, 1911, Leroux published this mysterious and intriguing novel. 

This dance performance tells the story of an architect with singing talent, who, however, could only perform with a mask due to his ugly appearance, which led to his twisted personality and the way he saw people as enemies. After he fell in love with a dancer named Christine, he kidnapped her. The incident resulted in an irreparable tragedy. This was inspired by the story of "Beauty and the Beast," but the author recreated  …
